shipped: Added a structured JSON response helper in src/respond.ts that all routes now return through (ok/error shapes), refactoring src/routes.ts to use it
acceptancePassed: ok(body) returns {status:200, body} -> a 200 JSON Response with that body
err(404, 'msg') returns {status:404, body:{error:'msg'}} -> a 404 JSON Response

edges.doStep: call ok() with a value containing a BigInt
edges.expect: a 500 with a clear error, not a thrown exception that crashes the server
